chunks.title: Hezekiah's Preparations for War
chunks.reason: Describes Hezekiah's strategic preparations and speech to the people before the Assyrian siege.

chunks.title: Sennacherib's Taunts
chunks.reason: Contains the Assyrian king's messengers delivering a speech to the people of Jerusalem.

chunks.title: Divine Deliverance and Victory
chunks.reason: Narrates the prayer of Hezekiah and Isaiah, the angelic strike on the Assyrians, and the subsequent tribute.

chunks.title: Hezekiah's Illness and Pride
chunks.reason: Details Hezekiah's sickness, the sign given, his initial pride, and subsequent humility.

chunks.title: Hezekiah's Legacy and Death
chunks.reason: Summarizes his remaining deeds and describes his burial and succession by Manasseh.
